content: By 2025, fully self-supervised autonomous agents will evolve a recursive intrinsic curiosity framework where the agent's own unlabeled episodic memory becomes both the source of self-supervision and the reward signal, eliminating the need for pre-specified environment goals or external training data. In this framework, the agent prioritizes exploring under-learned patterns in its own prior memory over exploring new environment states, creating a self-reinforcing cycle of capability growth that scales with the agent's size.
